tools.name: state_dir
tools.description: Return the operator's stado state-dir path as resolved by stado_cfg_state_dir. Demonstration plugin for the EP-0029 cfg:* capability vocabulary — copy as a starting point for plugins that need to compose paths under stado's state directory.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{},"description":"No arguments — the plugin returns one field: state_dir."}
